stemHtml: The Standards and Recommended Practices contained in ICAO Annex 6, Part I, are applicable to…

options.a: the operation of aeroplanes by operators authorised to conduct international commercial air transport operations.
options.b: all aeroplanes and helicopters engaged in international commercial air transport operations.
options.c: all international general aviation aeroplane operations, including large aeroplanes, turbojet aeroplanes, and corporate aviation operations.
options.d: all aeroplanes and helicopters engaged in international general aviation operations.
